logs.command: python -c "from pathlib import Path; files=[Path('frontend/index.html'),Path('frontend/modules/ai_dialog_page.js'),Path('frontend/modules/ai_chat.js')]; old='AI对话（控制平面入口）'; new='AI助手（控制平面入口）'; changed=sum(1 for p in files if p.exists() and old in p.read_text(encoding='utf-8') and (p.write_text(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8').replace(old,new,1),encoding='utf-8') or True)); print('changed',changed); raise SystemExit(0 if changed>0 else 1)"

python -c "from pathlib import Path; files=[Path('frontend/index.html'),Path('frontend/modules/ai_dialog_page.js'),Path('frontend/modules/ai_chat.js')]; txt=' '.join(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8') for p in files if p.exists()); ok=('AI助手（控制平面入口）' in txt) and ('AI对话（控制平面入口）' not in txt); print('verified',ok); raise SystemExit(0 if ok else 1)"
